sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94735" key="skeuoplastiko\s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκευο-πλαστικὸς</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τροχός, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n94735.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">potter's</tr_> wheel, Id.ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
